<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
// ─── Config — set this after: wrangler deploy ────────────────────────────────
const WORKER_URL = window.STAT_WORKER_URL || window.location.origin;
// const WORKER_URL = 'http://localhost:8787'; // wrangler dev

// ─── State ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let companies = [];
let alertsToday = 0;
let matches = [];
let resumeProfile = null;

// ─── API ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function api(path, opts = {}) {
  if (!WORKER_URL) throw new Error('WORKER_URL not configured');
  const r = await fetch(WORKER_URL + path, opts);
  return { ok: r.ok, status: r.status, data: await r.json() };
}

// ─── Toast ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function toast(msg, type = '') {
  const el = document.getElementById('toast');
  el.textContent = msg;
  el.className = 'toast show ' + type;
  clearTimeout(el._t);
  el._t = setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), 3200);
}

// ─── Log ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function log(msg, type = 'info') {
  const area = document.getElementById('log-area');
  const ts = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false });
  const tagText = { info: '[INFO]', match: '[MATCH]', dead: '[DEAD]', warn: '[WARN]' }[type] || '[INFO]';
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = 'log-entry';
  div.innerHTML = `<span class="log-ts">${ts}</span><span class="log-tag ${type}">${tagText}</span><span class="log-msg">${msg}</span>`;
  area.appendChild(div);
  area.scrollTop = area.scrollHeight;
  while (area.children.length > 200) area.removeChild(area.firstChild);
}

// ─── Status ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function loadStatus() {
  const dot = document.getElementById('conn-dot');
  const lbl = document.getElementById('conn-label');
  if (!WORKER_URL) {
    dot.className = 'conn-dot dead'; lbl.textContent = 'no worker url'; return;
  }
  dot.className = 'conn-dot loading'; lbl.textContent = 'fetching';
  try {
    const { ok, data } = await api('/');
    if (!ok) throw new Error();
    document.getElementById('s-dos').textContent   = data.activeDOs ?? '—';
    document.getElementById('s-cos').textContent   = data.watchedCompanies ?? '—';
    const seen = data.seenJobIds;
    document.getElementById('s-seen').textContent  = seen > 999 ? (seen/1000).toFixed(1)+'k' : seen ?? '—';
    document.getElementById('last-poll').textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour12:false});
    if (data.salary) {
      const s = data.salary;
      const salEl = document.getElementById('s-salary');
      if (s.status === 'active') {
        salEl.textContent = `✓ ${s.lcaRecords > 999 ? (s.lcaRecords/1000).toFixed(0)+'k' : s.lcaRecords} LCA · BLS ${s.blsCacheAge}`;
        salEl.style.color = 'var(--teal)';
      } else if (s.status === 'bls-pending') {
        salEl.textContent = `${s.lcaRecords} LCA · BLS pending`;
        salEl.style.color = 'var(--p2)';
      } else {
        salEl.textContent = 'cold-start';
        salEl.style.color = 'var(--dim)';
      }
    }
    dot.className = 'conn-dot live'; lbl.textContent = 'live';
    log('Status OK — ' + data.activeDOs + ' DOs, ' + data.watchedCompanies + ' companies');
    await loadCompanies();
  } catch(e) {
    dot.className = 'conn-dot dead'; lbl.textContent = 'offline';
    log('Connection failed: ' + e.message, 'warn');
    toast('Cannot reach STAT worker', 'error');
  }
}

// ─── Companies ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function loadCompanies() {
  const { ok, data } = await api('/companies');
  if (!ok) return;
  // /companies returns { platforms: [{ats, count, doActive, companies:[name,...]}] }
  // Flatten into the shape renderCompanies() and renderAts() expect:
  //   [{name, ats, token:'', watching: bool}]
  companies = (data.platforms ?? []).flatMap(p =>
    (p.companies ?? []).map(name => ({
      name,
      ats: p.ats,
      token: '',
      watching: p.doActive ?? false,
    }))
  );
  renderCompanies();
  renderAts();
  renderDoStatus();
}

async function renderDoStatus() {
  const el = document.getElementById('do-status');
  const platforms = ['greenhouse','lever','ashby','workday','icims','successfactors','taleo'];
  const rows = await Promise.all(platforms.map(async ats => {
    try {
      const { ok, data } = await api('/platform/' + ats + '/status');
      if (!ok) return null;
      const lastRun = data.lastRun
        ? new Date(data.lastRun).toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour12:false,hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})
        : 'never';
      const next = data.nextAlarm
        ? Math.max(0, Math.round((data.nextAlarm - Date.now()) / 1000)) + 's'
        : '—';
      const status = data.lastRun ? '●' : '○';
      const color = data.lastRun ? 'var(--teal)' : 'var(--dim)';
      return `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:3px">
        <span style="color:${color}">${status} ${ats.slice(0,6)}</span>
        <span style="color:var(--dim)">${lastRun} +${next}</span>
      </div>`;
    } catch { return null; }
  }));
  const html = rows.filter(Boolean).join('');
  el.innerHTML = html || '<p style="font-size:10px;color:var(--dim)">No data</p>';
}

function renderAts() {
  const counts = {};
  companies.forEach(c => counts[c.ats] = (counts[c.ats]||0)+1);
  const total = companies.length || 1;
  const el = document.getElementById('ats-breakdown');
  const sorted = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
  if (!sorted.length) { el.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:10px;color:var(--dim)">None loaded</p>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = sorted.map(([a,n]) => `
    <div class="ats-row">
      <span class="ats-key">${a}</span>
      <div class="ats-bar-bg"><div class="ats-bar-fill" style="width:${(n/total*100).toFixed(0)}%"></div></div>
      <span class="ats-n">${n}</span>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function renderCompanies() {
  const q = document.getElementById('co-search').value.toLowerCase();
  const filtered = companies.filter(c =>
    c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    c.ats.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    (c.token||'').toLowerCase().includes(q)
  );
  const el = document.getElementById('co-list');
  if (!filtered.length) {
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">?</div><p>No companies match "${q}"</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML = `
    <table class="co-table">
      <thead><tr>
        <th>Company</th><th>ATS</th><th>Token</th><th>Status</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${filtered.map(c => `
        <tr>
          <td>
            <div class="co-name">${c.name}</div>
            ${c.autoDiscovered ? '<div class="co-meta">auto-discovered</div>' : ''}
          </td>
          <td><span class="ats-pill ats-${c.ats}">${c.ats}</span></td>
          <td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--dim)">${c.token||'—'}</td>
          <td>
            <div class="watch-state">
              <div class="watch-dot ${c.watching?'active':''}"></div>
              ${c.watching ? 'watching' : 'idle'}
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody>
    </table>`;
}

// ─── Config ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderConfig() {
  const groups = [
    { p:1, label:'Epic / EHR / Healthcare IT',
      kws:['epic analyst','epic ambulatory','epiccare','clarity sql','ehr analyst','clinical informatics analyst','healthcare it analyst','epic cadence','epic build','epic beacon'] },
    { p:2, label:'Data / SQL / Analytics',
      kws:['data analyst','healthcare data analyst','sql analyst','bi analyst','data engineer','clinical data analyst'] },
    { p:3, label:'Product / Project / IT',
      kws:['product manager','systems analyst','it analyst','implementation consultant','it project manager'] },
  ];
  const ptClass = {1:'pt-1',2:'pt-2',3:'pt-3'};
  const blkClass = {1:'p1-block',2:'p2-block',3:'p3-block'};
  document.getElementById('kw-section').innerHTML = groups.map(g => `
    <div class="cfg-block ${blkClass[g.p]}" style="margin-bottom:12px">
      <div class="cfg-head">
        <span class="priority-tag ${ptClass[g.p]}">P${g.p}</span>
        <span class="cfg-label">${g.label}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cfg-body">
        <div class="kw-chips">
          ${g.kws.map(k=>`<span class="kw-chip">${k}</span>`).join('')}
          <span class="kw-chip more">+ more in config.js</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('') + '<br>';
}

// ─── Event handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
document.getElementById('btn-trigger').onclick = async () => {
  const b = document.getElementById('btn-trigger');
  b.classList.add('loading');
  log('Manual HiringCafe scan…');
  try {
    const { ok, data } = await api('/trigger', { method:'POST' });
    if (ok) {
      const n = data.newMatches ?? 0;
      log('Scan complete: ' + n + ' match' + (n!==1?'es':''), n>0?'match':'info');
      toast('Scan complete: ' + n + ' matches', n>0?'success':'');
      if (n>0) { alertsToday+=n; document.getElementById('s-alerts').textContent=alertsToday; }
    }
  } catch(e) { toast('Scan failed','error'); }
  b.classList.remove('loading');
};

document.getElementById('btn-bootstrap').onclick = async () => {
  const b = document.getElementById('btn-bootstrap');
  b.classList.add('loading');
  log('Bootstrapping DOs…');
  try {
    const { ok, data } = await api('/bootstrap', { method:'POST' });
    if (ok) { log('Bootstrap: ' + data.spawned + ' new DOs'); toast('Bootstrap complete'); await loadStatus(); }
  } catch(e) { toast('Bootstrap failed','error'); }
  b.classList.remove('loading');
};

document.getElementById('btn-refresh').onclick = async () => { await loadStatus(); toast('Refreshed'); };

document.getElementById('btn-backfill').onclick = async () => {
  const b = document.getElementById('btn-backfill');
  b.textContent = 'Backfilling…'; b.disabled = true;
  log('Backfilling Browse tab — polling all companies…');
  try {
    const { ok, data } = await api('/backfill-browse', { method: 'POST' });
    if (ok) {
      log('Backfill done: ' + data.unmatched_found + ' unmatched jobs from ' + data.companies_polled + ' companies', 'match');
      toast('Browse populated: ' + data.unmatched_found + ' jobs', 'success');
    }
  } catch(e) { toast('Backfill failed: ' + e.message, 'error'); }
  b.textContent = 'Backfill Browse tab'; b.disabled = false;
};

document.getElementById('btn-reset').onclick = async () => {
  if (!confirm('Clear all seen job IDs? STAT will re-alert on all currently live matching jobs on the next poll.')) return;
  const { ok } = await api('/reset-seen', { method:'POST' });
  if (ok) { log('Seen IDs cleared','warn'); toast('Seen IDs cleared','success'); await loadStatus(); }
};

document.getElementById('btn-show-add').onclick = () => {
  document.getElementById('add-form').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('f-name').focus();
};
document.getElementById('btn-add-cancel').onclick = () => {
  document.getElementById('add-form').style.display = 'none';
};
document.getElementById('btn-add-submit').onclick = async () => {
  const name  = document.getElementById('f-name').value.trim();
  const ats   = document.getElementById('f-ats').value;
  const token = document.getElementById('f-token').value.trim();
  const url   = document.getElementById('f-url').value.trim();
  if (!name || !ats || !token) { toast('Name, ATS, and token required','error'); return; }
  const b = document.getElementById('btn-add-submit');
  b.textContent = 'Adding…'; b.disabled = true;
  try {
    const { ok, data } = await api('/companies', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({ name, ats, token, ...(url?{url}:{}) }),
    });
    if (ok) {
      log('Added: ' + name + ' (' + ats + ':' + token + ')','match');
      toast('Now watching ' + name,'success');
      document.getElementById('add-form').style.display = 'none';
      ['f-name','f-token','f-url'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value='');
      await loadCompanies();
    } else {
      toast(data.error||'Add failed','error');
    }
  } catch(e) { toast('Error: '+e.message,'error'); }
  b.textContent = 'Add & start watching'; b.disabled = false;
};

document.getElementById('co-search').addEventListener('input', renderCompanies);

document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.onclick = () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
  t.classList.add('active');
  const tabId = 'tab-' + t.dataset.tab;
  document.getElementById(tabId).classList.add('active');
  if (t.dataset.tab === 'matches')   loadMatches();
  if (t.dataset.tab === 'browse')    loadBrowse();
  if (t.dataset.tab === 'resume')    loadStoredProfile();
  if (t.dataset.tab === 'companies') loadCompanies();  // Rule 10: load fresh on activation
  // config: renders from local config constants — no server fetch needed (Rule 10c)
  // log: append-only in-session log — no server state to fetch (Rule 10c)
});


// ─── Matches ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function loadMatches() {
  const priorityFilter = document.getElementById('match-priority').value;
  const q = document.getElementById('match-search').value.trim();
  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  if (priorityFilter) params.set('priority', priorityFilter);
  if (q) params.set('q', q);
  params.set('limit', '100');

  const { ok, data } = await api('/jobs?' + params.toString());
  if (!ok) return;
  matches = data.jobs ?? [];
  renderMatches();
}

function renderMatches() {
  const el = document.getElementById('match-list');
  if (!matches.length) {
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">S</div><p>No matches yet.<br>STAT will populate this as jobs are found.</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML = matches.map(renderMatchCard).join('');
  restoreFeedback(matches);
}

function renderMatchCard({ job, match, alertedAt }) {
  const pClass   = { 1: 'pt-1', 2: 'pt-2', 3: 'pt-3' }[match?.priority] || 'pt-3';
  const pLabel   = `P${match?.priority ?? '?'}`;
  const atsLabel = job.atsSource || '';
  const salary   = job.salary ? `<span class="salary-tag">${job.salary}${job.salaryInferred ? ' ~' : ''}</span>` : '';
  const env      = job.environment ? `<span class="env-tag">${job.environment}</span>` : '';
  const ghost    = job.ghostFlag === 'warn' ? `<span class="ghost-warn">⚠️ ${job.daysAgo}d old</span>` : '';
  const md       = job.mdBadge ? `<span class="md-badge">${job.mdBadge}</span>` : '';
  const liveness = job.liveness === 'unknown' ? `<span class="ghost-warn">⚡ unverified URL</span>` : '';

  let fitBadge = '';
  if (job.fitScore != null) {
    const cls = job.fitScore >= 7 ? 'high' : job.fitScore <= 4 ? 'low' : '';
    fitBadge = `<span class="fit-badge ${cls}">Fit ${job.fitScore}/10</span>`;
  }

  const when = alertedAt ? new Date(alertedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', hour12: true }) : '';

  return `
<div class="match-card">
  <div class="match-card-header">
    <span class="priority-tag ${pClass}">${pLabel}</span>
    <span class="match-card-title">${job.title}</span>
    <span class="ats-pill ats-${atsLabel}" style="flex-shrink:0">${atsLabel}</span>
  </div>
  <div class="match-card-company">${job.company}${job.location ? ' · ' + job.location : ''}${when ? ' · ' + when : ''}</div>
  <div class="match-card-meta">
    ${salary}${env}${fitBadge}${md}${ghost}${liveness}
    ${match?.label ? `<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--dim)">${match.label}</span>` : ''}
  </div>
  <div class="match-card-actions">
    <a href="${job.url}" target="_blank" class="apply-btn">Apply →</a>
    <button class="review-btn" id="rbtn-${job.id}" onclick="toggleReview('${job.id}')" title="Claude fit review">
      ✦ Review
    </button>
    <button class="feedback-btn" id="fbtn-applied-${job.id}" onclick="sendFeedback('${job.id}','applied',this)" title="Mark as applied">
      ✓ Applied
    </button>
    <button class="feedback-btn" id="fbtn-skip-${job.id}" onclick="sendFeedback('${job.id}','skip',this)" title="Skip this role">
      ✕ Skip
    </button>
    <button class="btn-cancel-form" onclick="scoreFromCard('${job.id}')" style="font-size:10px">Score</button>
  </div>
  <div class="review-panel" id="rpanel-${job.id}">
    <div class="review-panel-content" id="rcontent-${job.id}"></div>
  </div>
</div>`;
}

function scoreFromCard(jobId) {
  const entry = matches.find(m => m.job.id === jobId);
  if (!entry) return;
  // Switch to Resume tab and populate JD from match description
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelector('[data-tab="resume"]').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('tab-resume').classList.add('active');
  const jd = [entry.job.title, entry.job.company, entry.job.description || ''].join('\n\n');
  document.getElementById('jd-text').value = jd;
  toast('Job loaded — click Score This Job');
}

// ── Claude inline review ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
const reviewCache = {}; // jobId → rendered text

async function toggleReview(jobId) {
  const panel  = document.getElementById('rpanel-' + jobId);
  const content = document.getElementById('rcontent-' + jobId);
  const btn    = document.getElementById('rbtn-' + jobId);
  if (!panel || !content || !btn) return;

  const isOpen = panel.classList.contains('open');
  if (isOpen) {
    panel.classList.remove('open');
    btn.classList.remove('open');
    btn.textContent = '✦ Review';
    return;
  }

  // Open panel
  panel.classList.add('open');
  btn.classList.add('open');
  btn.textContent = '✦ Close';

  // Already cached
  if (reviewCache[jobId]) {
    content.innerHTML = reviewCache[jobId];
    return;
  }

  // Find job object
  const entry = matches.find(m => m.job.id === jobId);
  if (!entry) { content.textContent = 'Job not found.'; return; }
  const { job } = entry;

  content.innerHTML = '<span class="review-loading">✦ Claude is reviewing this role…</span>';
  btn.classList.add('loading');

  try {
    const res = await fetch(WORKER_URL + '/review', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        title:         job.title,
        company:       job.company,
        description:   job.description || '',
        requisitionId: job.hc?.requisitionId || '',
        location:      job.location || '',
        environment:   job.environment || '',
        salary:        job.salary || '',
      }),
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Request failed' }));
      content.textContent = '⚠ ' + (err.error || 'Review unavailable');
      btn.classList.remove('loading');
      return;
    }

    // Stream SSE tokens
    const reader = res.body.getReader();
    const dec = new TextDecoder();
    let buf = '';
    let text = '';
    content.textContent = '';

    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      if (done) break;
      buf += dec.decode(value, { stream: true });
      const lines = buf.split('\n');
      buf = lines.pop() ?? '';
      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue;
        const raw = line.slice(6).trim();
        if (raw === '[DONE]') break;
        try {
          const evt = JSON.parse(raw);
          if (evt.token) {
            text += evt.token;
            // Render markdown-lite: bold **text**
            content.innerHTML = text
              .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
              .replace(/
/g, '<br>');
          }
          if (evt.error) {
            content.textContent = '⚠ ' + evt.error;
          }
        } catch {}
      }
    }

    // Cache the rendered HTML
    reviewCache[jobId] = content.innerHTML;
  } catch (e) {
    content.textContent = '⚠ ' + e.message;
  } finally {
    btn.classList.remove('loading');
  }
}

// ── Feedback (Applied / Skip) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
async function sendFeedback(jobId, action, btn) {
  // Restore previously selected feedback for this job if any
  const appliedBtn = document.getElementById('fbtn-applied-' + jobId);
  const skipBtn    = document.getElementById('fbtn-skip-' + jobId);

  // Toggle off if clicking the already-active action
  const isActive = btn.classList.contains(action);
  [appliedBtn, skipBtn].forEach(b => { if (b) { b.classList.remove('applied','skip'); b.disabled = false; } });
  if (isActive) {
    // Un-mark — no server call needed, just visual reset
    return;
  }

  btn.disabled = true;
  try {
    const res = await fetch(WORKER_URL + '/feedback', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ jobId, action }),
    });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (res.ok && data.ok) {
      btn.classList.add(action);
      btn.disabled = false;
      // Dim the other button
      const other = action === 'applied' ? skipBtn : appliedBtn;
      if (other) { other.disabled = true; other.style.opacity = '0.3'; }
      toast(action === 'applied' ? '✓ Marked as applied' : '✕ Skipped', action === 'applied' ? 'success' : '');
    } else {
      btn.disabled = false;
      toast('Feedback failed: ' + (data.error || res.status), 'error');
    }
  } catch (e) {
    btn.disabled = false;
    toast('Feedback error: ' + e.message, 'error');
  }
}

// Restore feedback state from match data when cards render
function restoreFeedback(matches) {
  for (const { job } of matches) {
    if (!job?.feedback) continue;
    const appliedBtn = document.getElementById('fbtn-applied-' + job.id);
    const skipBtn    = document.getElementById('fbtn-skip-' + job.id);
    if (!appliedBtn || !skipBtn) continue;
    if (job.feedback === 'applied') {
      appliedBtn.classList.add('applied');
      skipBtn.disabled = true; skipBtn.style.opacity = '0.3';
    } else if (job.feedback === 'skip') {
      skipBtn.classList.add('skip');
      appliedBtn.disabled = true; appliedBtn.style.opacity = '0.3';
    }
  }
}

document.getElementById('btn-refresh-jobs').onclick = loadMatches;
document.getElementById('match-priority').addEventListener('change', loadMatches);
document.getElementById('match-search').addEventListener('input', () => {
  clearTimeout(window._matchSearchTimer);
  window._matchSearchTimer = setTimeout(loadMatches, 350);
});

// ─── Resume + Profile ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const GEMINI_MODEL = 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite-preview-06-17';
const GEMINI_EXTRACT_URL = 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/' + GEMINI_MODEL + ':generateContent';

// Note: resume analysis calls the Anthropic API directly from the browser.
// The Worker's GEMINI_KEY is not exposed to the client — we use claude.ai's
// built-in Anthropic API access via the artifact proxy.

// extractProfile calls the Worker's /extract-profile endpoint (Gemini server-side).
// No API key in the browser. Worker holds GEMINI_KEY.
async function extractProfile(resumeText) {
  const { ok, data } = await api('/extract-profile', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ text: resumeText }),
  });
  if (!ok || !data.profile) throw new Error(data.error || 'Extraction failed');
  return data.profile;
}

async function scoreJobDescription(profile, jd) {
  const { ok, data } = await api('/score-job', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ profile, jd }),
  });
  if (!ok || !data.result) throw new Error(data.error || 'Scoring failed');
  return data.result;
}

function renderProfile(profile) {
  if (!profile) {
    document.getElementById('profile-display').style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }
  document.getElementById('profile-display').style.display = '';
  const chips = (arr) => (arr || []).map(x => `<span class="profile-chip">${x}</span>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('profile-body').innerHTML = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <strong style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Role</strong>
      ${profile.headline || '—'} · ${profile.yearsExperience != null ? profile.yearsExperience + ' yrs exp' : ''}
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <strong style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Epic Modules</strong>
      <div>${chips(profile.epicModules)}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <strong style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Certifications</strong>
      <div>${chips(profile.certifications)}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <strong style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Skills</strong>
      <div>${chips(profile.skills)}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:4px">
      <strong style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px">Gaps</strong>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">${(profile.potentialGaps || []).join(' · ') || 'None identified'}</div>
    </div>
  `;
}

async function loadStoredProfile() {
  const { ok, data } = await api('/profile');
  if (ok && data.profile) {
    resumeProfile = data.profile;
    renderProfile(resumeProfile);
  }
}

// File upload
// NOTE: pdf-drop-zone is a <label> wrapping the input — clicking it
// natively triggers the file picker. No manual .click() needed or wanted.
// Adding one causes a double-trigger that cancels the picker on iOS/mobile.
document.getElementById('pdf-input').addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
  const file = e.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  const status = document.getElementById('resume-status');
  status.textContent = 'Reading file…';
  if (file.type === 'application/pdf') {
    // Extract text from PDF using FileReader + basic text extraction
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = async (ev) => {
      // Crude PDF text extraction — works for text-layer PDFs
      const raw = new Uint8Array(ev.target.result);
      const text = new TextDecoder('utf-8', { fatal: false }).decode(raw);
      const extracted = text.replace(/[^\x20-\x7E\n]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
      if (extracted.length > 100) {
        document.getElementById('resume-text').value = extracted.slice(0, 8000);
        status.textContent = 'PDF text extracted (' + extracted.length + ' chars). Click Analyze.';
      } else {
        status.textContent = 'PDF appears to be image-only. Please paste resume text manually.';
      }
    };
    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
  } else if (file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.docx')) {
    // DOCX is a ZIP archive of XML files. Parse it properly:
    // word/document.xml contains the actual resume text inside <w:t> tags.
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = async (ev) => {
      try {
        // Use the DecompressionStream API (available in modern browsers + Cloudflare Workers)
        // to decompress the ZIP entry for word/document.xml, then extract <w:t> text nodes.
        const zipBytes = new Uint8Array(ev.target.result);

        // Scan for the word/document.xml entry in the ZIP central directory
        // ZIP local file header: PK\x03\x04 + 26 bytes of metadata + filename
        let extracted = '';
        let offset = 0;
        while (offset < zipBytes.length - 4) {
          // Look for local file header signature
          if (zipBytes[offset]===0x50 && zipBytes[offset+1]===0x4B &&
              zipBytes[offset+2]===0x03 && zipBytes[offset+3]===0x04) {
            const compMethod   = zipBytes[offset+8]  | (zipBytes[offset+9]  << 8);
            const compSize     = zipBytes[offset+18] | (zipBytes[offset+19] << 8) |
                                 (zipBytes[offset+20]<< 16)| (zipBytes[offset+21]<< 24);
            const fnLen        = zipBytes[offset+26] | (zipBytes[offset+27] << 8);
            const extraLen     = zipBytes[offset+28] | (zipBytes[offset+29] << 8);
            const fnBytes      = zipBytes.slice(offset+30, offset+30+fnLen);
            const filename     = new TextDecoder().decode(fnBytes);
            const dataStart    = offset + 30 + fnLen + extraLen;

            if (filename === 'word/document.xml') {
              const compData = zipBytes.slice(dataStart, dataStart + compSize);
              let xmlText = '';
              if (compMethod === 8) {
                // deflate compressed
                const ds = new DecompressionStream('deflate-raw');
                const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
                const reader2 = ds.readable.getReader();
                writer.write(compData);
                writer.close();
                const chunks = [];
                while (true) {
                  const { done, value } = await reader2.read();
                  if (done) break;
                  chunks.push(value);
                }
                const total = chunks.reduce((a,c) => a+c.length, 0);
                const merged = new Uint8Array(total);
                let pos = 0;
                for (const c of chunks) { merged.set(c, pos); pos += c.length; }
                xmlText = new TextDecoder('utf-8', { fatal: false }).decode(merged);
              } else {
                // stored uncompressed
                xmlText = new TextDecoder('utf-8', { fatal: false }).decode(compData);
              }
              // Extract text from <w:t> nodes — these are the actual text runs in DOCX
              const wtMatches = xmlText.match(/<w:t[^>]*>([^<]+)<\/w:t>/g) || [];
              extracted = wtMatches
                .map(m => m.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ''))
                .join(' ')
                .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
                .trim();
              break;
            }
            offset = dataStart + compSize;
          } else {
            offset++;
          }
        }

        if (extracted.length > 100) {
          document.getElementById('resume-text').value = extracted.slice(0, 8000);
          status.textContent = 'DOCX parsed (' + extracted.length + ' chars). Click Analyze.';
        } else {
          status.textContent = 'DOCX could not be parsed. Please paste resume text manually.';
        }
      } catch(err) {
        status.textContent = 'DOCX parse error: ' + err.message + '. Please paste manually.';
      }
    };
    reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
  } else {
    // Plain text (.txt)
    const text = await file.text();
    document.getElementById('resume-text').value = text.slice(0, 8000);
    status.textContent = 'File loaded (' + text.length + ' chars). Click Analyze.';
  }
});

document.getElementById('btn-analyze-resume').onclick = async () => {
  const text = document.getElementById('resume-text').value.trim();
  if (!text) { toast('Paste or upload resume text first', 'error'); return; }
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-analyze-resume');
  const status = document.getElementById('resume-status');
  btn.textContent = 'Analyzing…'; btn.disabled = true;
  status.textContent = 'Calling Claude to extract profile…';
  try {
    const profile = await extractProfile(text);
    resumeProfile = profile;
    renderProfile(profile);
    // Save to Worker
    const { ok } = await api('/profile', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(profile),
    });
    if (ok) {
      status.textContent = '✓ Profile extracted and saved to STAT. Fit scoring is now active.';
      toast('Profile saved — fit scoring active', 'success');
    } else {
      status.textContent = 'Profile extracted but save failed. Check Worker status.';
    }
  } catch(e) {
    status.textContent = 'Error: ' + e.message;
    toast('Analysis failed: ' + e.message, 'error');
  }
  btn.textContent = 'Analyze Resume → Extract Profile'; btn.disabled = false;
};

document.getElementById('btn-clear-profile').onclick = async () => {
  if (!confirm('Delete stored resume profile? Fit scoring will be disabled.')) return;
  await api('/profile', { method: 'DELETE' });
  resumeProfile = null;
  document.getElementById('profile-display').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('resume-status').textContent = 'Profile cleared.';
  toast('Profile cleared', 'success');
};

document.getElementById('btn-score-jd').onclick = async () => {
  const jd = document.getElementById('jd-text').value.trim();
  if (!jd) { toast('Paste a job description first', 'error'); return; }
  if (!resumeProfile) { toast('Extract your profile first', 'error'); return; }
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-score-jd');
  const resultEl = document.getElementById('jd-score-result');
  btn.textContent = 'Scoring…'; btn.disabled = true;
  resultEl.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--dim)">Calling Claude…</div>';
  try {
    const result = await scoreJobDescription(resumeProfile, jd);
    const scoreClass = result.score >= 7 ? 'high' : result.score <= 4 ? 'low' : '';
    const fitColor = { high: 'var(--p3)', low: 'var(--p1)', '': 'var(--teal)' }[scoreClass];
    resultEl.innerHTML = `
<div class="score-result">
  <span class="score-number" style="color:${fitColor}">${result.score}</span><span style="font-size:14px;color:var(--dim)">/10</span>
  <div class="score-verdict">${result.verdict}</div>
  ${result.salaryNote ? `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px">${result.salaryNote}</div>` : ''}
  <div class="score-section">
    <strong>Strengths</strong>
    ${(result.strengths || []).map(s => '• ' + s).join('<br>')}
  </div>
  <div class="score-section">
    <strong>Gaps</strong>
    ${(result.gaps || []).map(g => '• ' + g).join('<br>')}
  </div>
  ${result.coverOpener ? `
  <div class="score-section">
    <strong>Cover Letter Opener</strong>
    <div class="cover-letter-box">
      ${result.coverOpener}
      <button class="copy-btn" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('${result.coverOpener.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}');this.textContent='Copied!';setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Copy',2000)">Copy</button>
    </div>
  </div>` : ''}
</div>`;
  } catch(e) {
    resultEl.innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--p1)">Error: ${e.message}</div>`;
    toast('Scoring failed', 'error');
  }
  btn.textContent = 'Score This Job →'; btn.disabled = false;
};


// ─── Browse (env-filtered, unmatched jobs) ────────────────────────────────────
async function loadBrowse() {
  const atsFilter = document.getElementById('browse-ats').value;
  const q = document.getElementById('browse-search').value.trim();
  const params = new URLSearchParams({ limit: '200' });
  if (atsFilter) params.set('ats', atsFilter);
  if (q) params.set('q', q);

  const { ok, data } = await api('/browse?' + params.toString());
  if (!ok) return;

  const totalEl = document.getElementById('browse-total');
  const filterParts = ['remote/hybrid', 'no keyword match'];
  if (atsFilter) filterParts.unshift(atsFilter);
  if (q) filterParts.push(`"${q}"`);
  totalEl.textContent = data.count + ' jobs shown' + (data.total > data.count ? ' of ' + data.total + ' stored' : '') + ' — ' + filterParts.join(', ');

  const el = document.getElementById('browse-list');
  if (!data.jobs || !data.jobs.length) {
    el.innerHTML = `<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">S</div><p>No unmatched jobs yet.<br>These appear once STAT polls and env-filters jobs that don't match your keywords.</p></div>`;
    return;
  }

  el.innerHTML = data.jobs.map(({ job, seenAt }) => {
    const ats     = job.atsSource || '';
    const salary  = job.salary ? `<span class="salary-tag">${job.salary}</span>` : '';
    const env     = job.environment ? `<span class="env-tag">${job.environment}</span>` : '';
    const ghost   = job.ghostFlag === 'warn' ? `<span class="ghost-warn">⚠️ ${job.daysAgo}d old</span>` : '';
    const when    = seenAt ? new Date(seenAt).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month:'short', day:'numeric' }) : '';
    return `
<div class="match-card">
  <div class="match-card-header">
    <span class="match-card-title">${job.title}</span>
    <span class="ats-pill ats-${ats}" style="flex-shrink:0">${ats}</span>
  </div>
  <div class="match-card-company">${job.company}${job.location ? ' · ' + job.location : ''}${when ? ' · seen ' + when : ''}</div>
  <div class="match-card-meta">${salary}${env}${ghost}</div>
  <div class="match-card-actions">
    <a href="${job.url}" target="_blank" class="apply-btn">View Job →</a>
    <button class="btn-cancel-form" onclick="browseScoreCard(this, '${job.id.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}', ${JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(job)).slice(1,-1)})" style="font-size:10px">Score against profile</button>
  </div>
</div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function browseScoreCard(btn, jobId, jobJson) {
  // Switch to Resume tab with title+company pre-filled in JD box
  try {
    const job = JSON.parse(jobJson);
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelector('[data-tab="resume"]').classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('tab-resume').classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('jd-text').value = [job.title, job.company, job.location, job.description || ''].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');
    toast('Job loaded in Resume tab — click Score This Job');
  } catch(e) { toast('Could not load job', 'error'); }
}

document.getElementById('btn-refresh-browse').onclick = loadBrowse;
document.getElementById('browse-ats').addEventListener('change', loadBrowse);
document.getElementById('browse-search').addEventListener('input', () => {
  clearTimeout(window._browseTimer);
  window._browseTimer = setTimeout(loadBrowse, 350);
});

// ─── Init ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
document.getElementById('log-t0').textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour12:false});
renderConfig();

if (WORKER_URL) {
  loadStatus();
  loadStoredProfile();
  setInterval(loadStatus, 30_000);

  // Refresh on return from home screen, tab switch back, or screen wake.
  // Only fires if hidden for >10s to avoid spurious refreshes from
  // brief focus changes (e.g. notification tray, app switcher glance).
  let _hiddenAt = null;
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
    if (document.hidden) {
      _hiddenAt = Date.now();
    } else {
      const away = _hiddenAt ? Date.now() - _hiddenAt : 0;
      if (away > 10_000) {
        loadStatus();
        const active = document.querySelector('.tab.active')?.dataset?.tab;
        if (active === 'matches') loadMatches();
        if (active === 'browse')  loadBrowse();
      }
      _hiddenAt = null;
    }
  });
} else {
  document.getElementById('conn-dot').className = 'conn-dot dead';
  document.getElementById('conn-label').textContent = 'no worker url';
  log('Set WORKER_URL in this file to connect','warn');
  toast('Set WORKER_URL at the top of ui.html','error');
}

// node_modules/ms/index.js
var require_ms = __commonJS({
  "node_modules/ms/index.js"(exports, module) {
    init_virtual_unenv_global_polyfill_cloudflare_unenv_preset_node_process();
    init_virtual_unenv_global_polyfill_cloudflare_unenv_preset_node_console();
    init_performance2();
    var s = 1e3;
    var m = s * 60;
    var h = m * 60;
    var d = h * 24;
    var w = d * 7;
    var y = d * 365.25;
    module.exports = function(val, options) {
      options = options || {};
      var type = typeof val;
      if (type === "string" && val.length > 0) {
        return parse(val);
      } else if (type === "number" && isFinite(val)) {
        return options.long ? fmtLong(val) : fmtShort(val);
      }
      throw new Error(
        "val is not a non-empty string or a valid number. val=" + JSON.stringify(val)
      );
    };
    function parse(str) {
      str = String(str);
      if (str.length > 100) {
        return;
      }
      var match = /^(-?(?:\d+)?\.?\d+) *(milliseconds?|msecs?|ms|seconds?|secs?|s|minutes?|mins?|m|hours?|hrs?|h|days?|d|weeks?|w|years?|yrs?|y)?$/i.exec(
        str
      );
      if (!match) {
        return;
      }
      var n = parseFloat(match[1]);
      var type = (match[2] || "ms").toLowerCase();
      switch (type) {
        case "years":
        case "year":
        case "yrs":
        case "yr":
        case "y":
          return n * y;
        case "weeks":
        case "week":
        case "w":
          return n * w;
        case "days":
        case "day":
        case "d":
          return n * d;
        case "hours":
        case "hour":
        case "hrs":
        case "hr":
        case "h":
          return n * h;
        case "minutes":
        case "minute":
        case "mins":
        case "min":
        case "m":
          return n * m;
        case "seconds":
        case "second":
        case "secs":
        case "sec":
        case "s":
          return n * s;
        case "milliseconds":
        case "millisecond":
        case "msecs":
        case "msec":
        case "ms":
          return n;
        default:
          return void 0;
      }
    }
    __name(parse, "parse");
    function fmtShort(ms) {
      var msAbs = Math.abs(ms);
      if (msAbs >= d) {
        return Math.round(ms / d) + "d";
      }
      if (msAbs >= h) {
        return Math.round(ms / h) + "h";
      }
      if (msAbs >= m) {
        return Math.round(ms / m) + "m";
      }
      if (msAbs >= s) {
        return Math.round(ms / s) + "s";
      }
      return ms + "ms";
    }
    __name(fmtShort, "fmtShort");
    function fmtLong(ms) {
      var msAbs = Math.abs(ms);
      if (msAbs >= d) {
        return plural(ms, msAbs, d, "day");
      }
      if (msAbs >= h) {
        return plural(ms, msAbs, h, "hour");
      }
      if (msAbs >= m) {
        return plural(ms, msAbs, m, "minute");
      }
      if (msAbs >= s) {
        return plural(ms, msAbs, s, "second");
      }
      return ms + " ms";
    }
    __name(fmtLong, "fmtLong");
    function plural(ms, msAbs, n, name) {
      var isPlural = msAbs >= n * 1.5;
      return Math.round(ms / n) + " " + name + (isPlural ? "s" : "");
    }
    __name(plural, "plural");
  }
});

    function setup(env2) {
      createDebug.debug = createDebug;

      createDebug.disable = disable;

      createDebug.enabled = enabled;
      createDebug.humanize = require_ms();
      createDebug.destroy = destroy;
      Object.keys(env2).forEach((key) => {
        createDebug[key] = env2[key];
      });
      createDebug.names = [];
      createDebug.skips = [];
      createDebug.formatters = {};
      function selectColor(namespace) {
        let hash = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < namespace.length; i++) {
          hash = (hash << 5) - hash + namespace.charCodeAt(i);
          hash |= 0;
        }
        return createDebug.colors[Math.abs(hash) % createDebug.colors.length];
      }
      __name(selectColor, "selectColor");
      createDebug.selectColor = selectColor;
      function createDebug(namespace) {
        let prevTime;
        let enableOverride = null;
        let namespacesCache;
        let enabledCache;
        function debug4(...args) {
          if (!debug4.enabled) {
            return;
          }
          const self2 = debug4;
          const curr = Number(/* @__PURE__ */ new Date());
          const ms = curr - (prevTime || curr);
          self2.diff = ms;
          self2.prev = prevTime;
          self2.curr = curr;
          prevTime = curr;
          args[0] = createDebug.coerce(args[0]);
          if (typeof args[0] !== "string") {
            args.unshift("%O");
          }
          let index = 0;
          args[0] = args[0].replace(/%([a-zA-Z%])/g, (match, format) => {
            if (match === "%%") {
              return "%";
            }
            index++;
            const formatter = createDebug.formatters[format];
            if (typeof formatter === "function") {

            }

          logFn.apply(self2, args);
        }
        __name(debug4, "debug");
        debug4.namespace = namespace;
        debug4.useColors = createDebug.useColors();
        debug4.color = createDebug.selectColor(namespace);
        debug4.extend = extend;
        debug4.destroy = createDebug.destroy;
        Object.defineProperty(debug4, "enabled", {
          enumerable: true,
          configurable: false,
          get: /* @__PURE__ */ __name(() => {
            if (enableOverride !== null) {
              return enableOverride;
            }

            }

      }
      __name(createDebug, "createDebug");
      function extend(namespace, delimiter) {
        const newDebug = createDebug(this.namespace + (typeof delimiter === "undefined" ? ":" : delimiter) + namespace);
        newDebug.log = this.log;
        return newDebug;
      }
      __name(extend, "extend");
      function enable(namespaces) {
        createDebug.save(namespaces);
        createDebug.namespaces = namespaces;
        createDebug.names = [];
        createDebug.skips = [];
        const split = (typeof namespaces === "string" ? namespaces : "").trim().replace(/\s+/g, ",").split(",").filter(Boolean);
        for (const ns of split) {
          if (ns[0] === "-") {
            createDebug.skips.push(ns.slice(1));
          } else {
            createDebug.names.push(ns);
          }
        }
      }
      __name(enable, "enable");
      function matchesTemplate(search, template) {
        let searchIndex = 0;
        let templateIndex = 0;
        let starIndex = -1;
        let matchIndex = 0;
        while (searchIndex < search.length) {
          if (templateIndex < template.length && (template[templateIndex] === search[searchIndex] || template[templateIndex] === "*")) {
            if (template[templateIndex] === "*") {
              starIndex = templateIndex;
              matchIndex = searchIndex;
              templateIndex++;
            } else {
              searchIndex++;
              templateIndex++;
            }
          } else if (starIndex !== -1) {
            templateIndex = starIndex + 1;
            matchIndex++;
            searchIndex = matchIndex;
          } else {
            return false;
          }
        }
        while (templateIndex < template.length && template[templateIndex] === "*") {
          templateIndex++;
        }
        return templateIndex === template.length;
      }
      __name(matchesTemplate, "matchesTemplate");
      function disable() {
        const namespaces = [
          ...createDebug.names,
          ...createDebug.skips.map((namespace) => "-" + namespace)
        ].join(",");
        createDebug.enable("");
        return namespaces;
      }
      __name(disable, "disable");
      function enabled(name) {
        for (const skip of createDebug.skips) {
          if (matchesTemplate(name, skip)) {
            return false;
          }
        }
        for (const ns of createDebug.names) {
          if (matchesTemplate(name, ns)) {
            return true;
          }
        }
        return false;
      }
      __name(enabled, "enabled");
      function coerce(val) {
        if (val instanceof Error) {
          return val.stack || val.message;
        }
        return val;
      }
      __name(coerce, "coerce");

  "node_modules/@cloudflare/puppeteer/lib/esm/puppeteer/node/NodeWebSocketTransport.js"() {
    init_virtual_unenv_global_polyfill_cloudflare_unenv_preset_node_process();
    init_virtual_unenv_global_polyfill_cloudflare_unenv_preset_node_console();
    init_performance2();
    import_ws = __toESM(require_browser2(), 1);
    init_version();
    NodeWebSocketTransport = class _NodeWebSocketTransport {
      static {
        __name(this, "NodeWebSocketTransport");
      }
      static create(url, headers) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          const ws = new import_ws.default(url, [], {
            followRedirects: true,
            perMessageDeflate: false,
            // @ts-expect-error https://github.com/websockets/ws/blob/master/doc/ws.md#new-websocketaddress-protocols-options
            allowSynchronousEvents: false,
            maxPayload: 256 * 1024 * 1024,
            // 256Mb
            headers: {
              "User-Agent": `Puppeteer ${packageVersion}`,
              ...headers
            }
          });
          ws.addEventListener("open", () => {
            return resolve(new _NodeWebSocketTransport(ws));
          });
          ws.addEventListener("error", reject);
        });
      }
      #ws;
      onmessage;
      onclose;
      constructor(ws) {
        this.#ws = ws;
        this.#ws.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
          if (this.onmessage) {
            this.onmessage.call(null, event.data);
          }
        });
        this.#ws.addEventListener("close", () => {
          if (this.onclose) {
            this.onclose.call(null);
          }
        });
        this.#ws.addEventListener("error", () => {
        });
      }
      send(message) {
        this.#ws.send(message);
      }
      close() {
        this.#ws.close();
      }
    };
  }
});
